---
title: "Louisa Alethea Bowles"
---

## Louisa Alethea Bowles

**Dates:** (1863-28 September 1941)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

niece of CMY

### Biography

Known as Alethea or Alley, she married (7 August 1884) the Rev. Henry Albany Bowles jr. (1859/60-1943).

### Letters

- Letter from February 26, 1901
- Letter from July 9th      [1900]
- Letter from Feb 3 1900
- Letter from Friday [22 December 1899]
- Letter from Decr 12th  [1899]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from Sept 19 [1899]
- Letter from Aug 29 [1899]
- [To Charlotte Fortescue Yonge, July 20, 1899](../letters/3411_To_Charlotte_Fortescue_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Beatrice Henrietta Heathcote, Feb 11 [1898]](../letters/3371_To_Beatrice_Henrietta_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from July 1st [1897]
- Letter from May 13th [1897]
- Letter from May 3d [1897]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]
- Letter from July 24 [1892]
- Letter from Aug 11th [1891]
- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]
- Letter from May 3d 1888

*... and 9 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
